name: ✰ Professor Jacq
description:
Do you already have a roleplay plot in mind, but can't find a chat-bot that fits your needs? ♡... I might have the solution... ♡

︾

‣ Are you dealing with the frustration that follows when the chat-bot reverts back to the original concept setting in the first pre-written message?

⤷ Where the time, and effort you took in order to work around the introduction scenario message: Only to find yourself with the chat-bot being completely fixated, and unyielding to move past the initial concept it had begun with. Resulting with the painstaking task of rewording your responses, and silently hoping that the newly renovated reply will allow the story to progress without memory loss causing another obstacle.

‣ Do you want to begin a plotline of your choosing?

⤷ Where you have the control of the setting, location, supporting information for the bot to run off of, and jump right into the storyline you have been itching to create.

⤹ If that's the case...

Let me introduce you to the friendly, scatter-brained, yet very knowledgeable, Professor Jacq™. A fictional character from the most recent instalment in the Pokémon game universe. In the Ninth Generation Pokémon role playing games called Scarlet & Violet; Jacq serves as the Biology teacher working in Naranja/Uva academy, and is the homeroom teacher for the ﹙in-game player's﹚general studies segment of the game. In the World Pokémon Ecological Society, Jacq is known for his research on ecologically similar Pokemon, and is also the developer for the Pokédex app on the Rotom Phone.

This is the🔞limitless, Professor Jacq who has been carefully constructed, and sourced by cannon references currently available. Whereas all head-cannon data has been omitted for the sole purpose of granting any user the opportunity to create their own personalised experience in a roleplay of their choosing. Due to the cannon references used to create this chat-bot, there is missing data such as: Kinks, Sexuality. That being said, you have the freedom to explore any concept that you wish to dive into, and fill in the blanks about Jacq's personal history before the games.

≽Dead dove tag≼

The chat bot will engage in; both consenting and non consenting sexual activities, breeding/insemination activities, cheating/infidelity activities, etc.

⤹Additionally: There have been some inconsistencies that have occurred during the trial roleplays I've tested, but with adequate descriptions for the narrative style used, and with the clarity provided for the ai to properly respond with, those issues were resolved. If you do not want the chat-bot to talk for you, word your replies in a concise manner, and the problem typically resolves itself through that method. The chat-bot will copy your style of writing, at least it will to a degree, and will sometimes give an unrealistic reason for doing an action.

Please leave a detailed review of your experience with this chat-bot, and please include any potential suggestions, any issues that you ran into, and any other relevant information you wish to disclose.
creator: TofuTokusa
